title: Ancol Heritage Floppy Bunny Dog Toy Soft Plush Interactive Fun Lightweight Squeaky Stuffed Cuddling Playing Washable Pet Puppy Toy for All Breeds
features: Texture: Crafted from soft plush material, this floppy bunny toy offers a comforting and gentle feel that’s perfect for cuddling, making it a favourite companion for dogs who enjoy snuggling.
Playfulness: Designed to encourage active fun, the toy includes a built-in squeaker that captures your dog’s attention and inspires hours of interactive indoor or outdoor play.
Engagement: Ideal for games of retrieve, this lightweight toy can be easily carried or thrown, promoting exercise and mental stimulation through active and engaging play sessions.
Practicality: Fully washable for easy cleaning, this plush bunny toy is built to handle regular use, maintaining hygiene while supporting your pet’s comfort and wellbeing.
Versatility: Suitable for all breeds, this soft stuffed toy is perfect for puppies and adult dogs alike, providing playful fun and companionship across a wide range of dog sizes.
description: From the manufacturer Ancol Heritage Floppy Bunny Dog Toy Firm cuddly toys for dogs who love to cuddle Multiple textures for interest Crinkle noise for interest Holds a scent for comfort Features recycled stuffing Toy length: 54cm Since 1971 the Ancol family have been at the forefront of quality pet accessory design. The Heritage Collection celebrates this history with classic, country-inspired materials and beautifully designed, indulgent dog toys, beds, and coats. Important: Please note that this toy is designed for cuddling and gently play and is not indestructible. For safety reasons dogs should be supervised when playing with toys.
